title: Word2Vec Framework
content:
# Word2Vec Framework

## 1. Skip-Gram Objective
$$\mathcal{L} = \frac{1}{T} \sum_{t=1}^T \sum_{-c \le j \le c, j \neq 0} \ln P(w_{t+j} \mid w_t)$$

## 2. Output Softmax Probability
$$P(w_o \mid w_i) = \frac{\exp(\mathbf{v}'^{\top}_{w_o} \mathbf{v}_{w_i})}{\sum_{w=1}^V \exp(\mathbf{v}'^{\top}_{w} \mathbf{v}_{w_i})}$$
